description_long: This object is a delicate flowering plant with a central upright stem supporting a cluster of small, pale yellow-green flowers. The inflorescence is dense, with individual flowers arranged closely together, each displaying rounded petals and a subtle, creamy hue. Slender, elongated green leaves extend outward from the base and sides, some arching gracefully and others remaining more upright. The leaves are narrow and lanceolate, with a smooth texture and pointed tips. The overall structure is airy, with visible gaps between the leaves and flowers, giving it a light, natural appearance. This type of plant is commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or roadside green spaces, adding a touch of wild beauty to the environment.
description: A slender flowering plant with pale yellow-green clustered flowers and long, narrow green leaves, arranged in an airy, upright form.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense flower cluster and two prominent, arching green leaves extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated leaves and the layered arrangement of the flower cluster, with more visible gaps between elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the flower cluster and the symmetry of the leaves, with the central stem clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the angled orientation of the flowers and the overlapping leaves, emphasizing the plant's verticality.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, whorled cluster at the top of the stem, with each flower displaying radial symmetry and slight overlapping of petals.
